name: Wrongful death—hubby killed in Ogden crane collapse, what claims for family?
description: Comp benefits + lawsuit for lost income/funeral.

mainEntity.name: Wrongful death—hubby killed in Ogden crane collapse, what claims for family?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp benefits + lawsuit for lost income/funeral.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp death benefits plus third-party wrongful death suit for full losses.** Family pursues[2]. **Key factors:** 1. Funeral, lost support. 2. Negligent parties liable. 3. 2-4 year limits. 4. No comp for grief. Lawyer files for max including punitives possible.
